title: Grisel Beauty Spa (FR)
heroTitle: Give yourself a moment of wellness (FR)
heroSubtitle: A quiet, personal-attention spa built around one idea: rest is not a luxury, it is maintenance. Facials, massage therapy, and waxing, delivered with care and unhurried attention. (FR)
approachTitle: Treatments built around you, not a menu (FR)
approachBody: Every session starts with a conversation about your skin, your stress, and what you need from the hour. Grisel Beauty Spa has spent years earning a reputation across Maryland, DC, and Virginia for quality products, a clean and calm space, and treatments that are never rushed. (FR)
readyBody: Book your session online or give us a call to find the perfect treatment. (FR)
